releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Good News 🎉 

In this release, the graph banner opens more smoothly!
Graph Banner plugin no longer opens new window momentarily 👋🏻 

## What's Changed
* Update dependency @types/node to v20.9.5 by @renovate in https://github.com/ras0q/obsidian-graph-banner/pull/71
* Update dependency node to v20.17.0 by @renovate in https://github.com/ras0q/obsidian-graph-banner/pull/72
* Improve graph open speed, No longer open a new window. by @ras0q in https://github.com/ras0q/obsidian-graph-banner/pull/74
* Refactor/css by @ras0q in https://github.com/ras0q/obsidian-graph-banner/pull/76
* Update pnpm to v9.10.0 by @renovate in https://github.com/ras0q/obsidian-graph-banner/pull/73
* Update dependency typescript to v5.6.2 by @renovate in https://github.com/ras0q/obsidian-graph-banner/pull/75


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ras0q/obsidian-graph-banner/compare/1.3.0...1.3.2
